pitchSequence.description: Popped up on the infield

notes: Gomez had flied out in the first. Stipe catches the popup for out number one.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball away, ball one
Curveball cut on and missed, strike one
Hard liner up the middle, base hit

notes: Count went 1-0, then 1-1 before the single. Norton had grounded into a double play in his first time up. One out when Norton reaches.

pitchSequence.description: Hammered foul and out of play, strike one
Hit in the air to shallow left, drops in for a hit

notes: Count was 0-1 before the hit. Lamont had a base hit in the second. Norton advances to third on the hit. Runners on corners, one out.

pitchSequence.description: Hard grounder up the middle, past a diving Colbert

notes: RBI single for Del Greco. Norton scores from third to give the Bombers a 1-0 lead — first run of the game. Runners on first and second, one out after the play. Del Greco had a base hit in the second.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball low, ball one
Fastball called strike, strike one
Chopper foul off to the right, strike two
Swing and a miss on a low slider, strike three

notes: Count progression: 1-0, 1-1, 1-2, then strikeout. Second out of the inning. Runners remain on first and second.

pitchSequence.description: Bouncer back to the mound

notes: Flores scoops it up and tosses to first to retire Howl. Ends the top of the fourth. Howl had struck out in the second. Bombers lead 1-0 after three and a half.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball called strike one
Lifted into right field, routine fly ball

notes: Count was 0-1 before the flyout. Colbert had grounded out in the first. Lamont makes the routine catch for out number one. Loons send up the 2-3-4 hitters.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play, strike one
Slider low and inside, ball one
Curveball cut on and missed, strike two
Off-speed pitch high and outside, ball two
Hit in the air to deep left, knuckles foul and out of play
Changeup called strike three

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 1-1, 1-2, 2-2, 2-2 (foul), then called strikeout. Vega had grounded out in the first. Two outs.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball paints the corner, called strike one
Slider called strike, strike two
Fly ball into left center

notes: Count went 0-1, 0-2 before the flyout. Primero had flied out in the second. Yamaguchi calls for it and makes the catch to end the inning. McKeever's second consecutive 1-2-3 inning. Score remains Bombers 1, Loons 0.
